stemHtml: Pilots are testing the fire warning system. They select loop 1 and carry out a test, they see a red warning indication and hear a bell. They then select loop 2 and press the test button and nothing happens. What is the reason for this?

options.a: The entire dual loop system is faulty.
options.b: No action is required as this is normal, as long as loop 1 is working.
options.c: Loop 1 is working but Loop 2 is faulty.
options.d: Loop 2 is working but Loop 1 is faulty.
